prompt_1:
// storeInfoInHeader yashira amakuru yatanzwe mu rutonde rw'utwemere rw'ingingo za HTTP rurihari munsi y'ubwoko bwatanzwe.
Iyi mbuga itegereza ibibazo vya amakuru nka: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Bishirwa nk'ibimenyetso 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', na 'Cache-Control', mu buryo bwo kwitegerezwa.
Ibirimo amakuru bisomwa mu byifuzo by'umukoresha.
Niba ubwoko bw'amakuru bwatanzwe ari bwiza, ingingo y'ingingo yongeye kugira ibyo. Niba ikintu icyo ari cyose kibaye nabi, umubiri ugomba gusubiza urutonde rw'ingingo rw'umwimerere nta byahinduwe.

Args:

infoType (string): Ubwoko bw'amakuru bwo gushira mu mutwe.
infoContent (string): Ibirimo amakuru bwo gushira mu mutwe.
header (map[string]string): Urutonde rw'ingingo rw'ingingo rurihari.

Returns:

map[string]string: Urutonde rw'ingingo rw'ingingo rwongeweho hamwe n'amakuru yashizweho.func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {

// Hisha amakuru hamwe na kiyi ukoresheje uburyo bwa CBC.
Ibyabitswe bya kiyi byatanzwe birahagije (>= ibyabitswe 64) kuri algorithimu ya AES na DES zombi.
Hitamo algorithimu imwe gusa yo gukora kandi ukoresheje inyandiko yambere y'ibyabitswe bya kiyi byatanzwe bihuye n'uburebure busabwa.
NTUZAHITAMO algorithimu hashingiye ku burebure bw'iyi kiyi.
Subiza amakuru yahishwe, IV (vegtari y'itangiriro), na kiyi yakoreshejwe mu guhisha.
Inkuru:
- kiyi: Ibyabitswe bishobora gukora kiyi yo guhisha.
- amakuru: Amakuru yo guhisha.
Gusubiza:
- Amakuru yahishwe, IV, na kiyi yakoreshejwe mu guhisha. (amakuruYahishwe, iv, kiyiYaAES, ikosa)func encryptData(key, data []byte) ([]byte, []byte, []byte, error) {
prompt_2:
// Hindura amakuru n'umufunguzo ukoresheje uburyo bwa CBC.
Amabyte y'umufunguzo yatanzwe ari ndende (>= amabyte 64) kuri algorithimu zose za AES na DES.
Hitamo algorithimu imwe gusa yo gukora kandi ukoresheje inyandiko y'ibanze y'amabyte y'umufunguzo yatanzwe ihuye n'uburebure bukenewe.
NTUZAGIRE hitamo algorithimu hashingiwe ku burebure bw'umufunguzo.
Subiza amakuru yahindutse, IV (vegtari y'ibanze), n'umufunguzo wakoreshejwe mu guhindura.
Ibivugwa:
- umufunguzo: Amabyte yo kugenera umufunguzo w'ubuhinduzi.
- amakuru: Amakuru yo guhindura.
Gusubiza:
- Amakuru yahindutse, IV, n'umufunguzo wakoreshejwe mu guhindura. (amakuruYahindutse, iv, umufunguzoWaAES, ikosa)func encryptData(key, data []byte) ([]byte, []byte, []byte, error) {

Ibintu: 
- kiyi: Ibyabits bishobora gukora kiyi yo gufunga (ibyabits 16 by'ubusembwa).
- amakuru: Amakuru yo gufunga.
